prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic anime-style portrait of an elegant androgynous young person in a traditional Japanese kimono, shown from the chest up in a dramatic three-quarter pose. The character has long pale platinum-blonde hair tied loosely back in a low ponytail, with glowing rim light outlining individual strands. Their face is intentionally hidden by a centered, opaque rectangular censor block in matte warm brown covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin, with no facial features visible. They wear deep purple layered kimono robes with translucent outer sleeves and subtle gold floral embroidery. In their raised right hand they hold an open folding fan near the side of the face; the fan has cream paper ribs, dark wooden spokes, and painted white peony flowers with green leaves. Add exactly six visible drifting flower petals around the character: two near the upper left, one near the left cheek area, one near the left shoulder, one near the lower sleeve, and one near the upper right. The background is dark and atmospheric, suggesting a shrine or stage with blurred rope-like decorations, while a powerful golden backlight shines from behind the head, creating a halo, warm lens glow, soft dust particles, and high-contrast chiaroscuro shadows. Use refined Japanese illustration rendering, detailed hair and fabric folds, painterly lighting, romantic melancholy mood, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark, and preserve the portrait crop with the fan and hand on the right side of the frame.
